slots.notes: Navbar logo as an inline svg graphic, default to current-color, sitting inside a 32x32 bounding box. Vertically centered. No background.
Fullscreen autoplaying muted looping hero background video, absolute inset-0 object-cover behind the HX1/CTA stack. Required: space/spacecraft or artistic space loop.

Testimonial section background image (galaxy scene with a soft dark gradient overlay for optional text overlay). Use the reference image from the repo or a similar space scene. Repeatable across other hero sections. The reference image supplied in the repo should be used as is as possible. If the reference image is not available, a similar space scene can be substituted.

Content imagery for the Gallery section (cover-cropped, responsive) - product, location, or concept photos depending on subject. Reference repo does not have gallery images, so your own stock picks are fine. Try to stay consistent with the dark space theme.
